t_ch: 放心吧，他们一定会平安无事。她是这么承诺的。
t_en: Don't worry. They'll be safe and sound. She promised.

t_ch: 昔涟…？
t_en: Cyrene...?

t_ch: 她在哪…？
t_en: Where is she...?

t_ch: 别着急，她总会在恰当的时刻出现。
t_en: Don't worry. She always shows up at just the right moment.

t_ch: 星穹列车…实话说，很有「家园」的感觉。
t_en: The Astral Express... honestly, it really feels like "home."

t_ch: 我能想象，你、丹恒、还有三月小姐，你们被困在翁法罗斯时，一定十分想念这里的一切：漂亮的窗户，惬意的音乐，列车上的旅伴……
t_en: I can imagine how much you, Dan Heng, and Miss March must have missed everything here when you were trapped in Amphoreus. The beautiful windows, the soothing music, your fellow travelers on the Express...

t_ch: 就像无数次轮回中的每个夜晚，金色的麦穗总会在我的梦中摇曳。
t_en: Like how golden wheat stalks sway in my dreams every night through the countless cycles...

t_ch: 一起去旅行吧，搭档。
t_en: Let's go on a journey together, partner.

t_ch: 这漫天的星星，在其中的某一颗上，一定也有类似哀丽秘榭的小村庄吧？
t_en: Among all these stars in the sky, there must be another little village like Aedes Elysiae out there, right?

t_ch: 银河中一定也有那样的小村庄。
t_en: There must be a village like that somewhere in the cosmos.

t_ch: 你是在邀请我加入旅行吗？
t_en: Are you inviting me to join your journey?

t_ch: 我好像找到属于自己的「愿望」了，搭档。
t_en: I think I've found my own "wish," partner.

t_ch: 曾有人对我说，「家」就是让你感到自由自在的地方。
t_en: Someone once told me that "home" is where you can be truly free and at ease.

t_ch: 也许…和你们，还有大伙儿一起漫游银河，就是我现在最强烈的念想。当然，是所有人一起。
t_en: Maybe... roaming the cosmos with you all is my strongest desire right now. All of us together, of course.

t_ch: 仙舟联盟，匹诺康尼…都怪我的想象力太匮乏，光听丹恒的描述，我完全想象不出那些世界的样貌。
t_en: The Xianzhou Alliance, Penacony... I blame my poor imagination. I can't picture what those worlds look like at all from Dan Heng's descriptions.

t_ch: 只有眼见为实了，对吗？
t_en: So I have to see it with my own eyes, right?

t_ch: 眼见为实。
t_en: You'll see it with your own eyes.

t_ch: 约好了，搭档。
t_en: That's a promise, partner.

t_ch: 终于来了。{NICKNAME}正有话想问你呢。
t_en: You're finally here! {NICKNAME} has something to ask you.

t_ch: 那么，你们先聊。
t_en: Well then, I'll leave you two to chat.

t_ch: 谢谢你，白厄。
t_en: Thank you, Phainon.

t_ch: 好好地睡了一觉，现在一定活力满满了吧，{NICKNAME}？
t_en: After such a good sleep, you must be bursting with energy now, right, {NICKNAME}?

t_ch: 不好意思啦。第一次来列车作客，本来想请各位都守规矩点的…但大家就是一个个的个性十足呢。你懂的，对吧？
t_en: Sorry about that. Since it's our first time visiting the Express, I was hoping everyone would behave... But it turns out everyone's quite the character, aren't they? You know what I mean, right?

t_ch: 这一刻…是真实的吗？
t_en: Is all this... real?

t_ch: 和我说说发生了什么吧。
t_en: Tell me what happened.

t_ch: 不如，回顾一下此前发生的一切吧？
t_en: How about we take a look back at everything that's happened so far?

t_ch: 我们合力战胜了铁墓；它试图化作万亿簇病毒，侵染银河；但英雄们以自身投入金焰，成为箭矢，净化了「毁灭」……
t_en: Together, we triumphed over Irontomb. It tried to transform into trillions of viral clusters to infect the cosmos, but the heroes threw themselves into the golden flames, becoming arrows that purified the Destruction...

t_ch: 而铁墓的殒落，也象征着权杖δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>的衰亡。<color=#dbc291ff>翁法罗斯——我们为之付出一切的家园——如今只存在于银河的记忆中了。</color>
t_en: The fall of Irontomb also symbolizes the demise of Scepter δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>. <color=#dbc291ff>Amphoreus — the home we sacrificed everything for — now exists only in the memories of the cosmos.</color>

t_ch: 所以…这只是一片幻境。
t_en: So... this is just an illusion.

t_ch: 所以，这并不是现实……
t_en: So, this isn't real...

t_ch: 只是一场梦…一片幻境。
t_en: Just a dream... an illusion.
Hehe...

t_ch: 可惜，回答错误♪
t_en: Oops, wrong answer ♪

t_ch: 在你以「开拓」冲破时空，背负全世「记忆」回到现实的一霎——
t_en: In that instant when you broke through space-time with the Trailblaze, carrying all the world's memories back to reality...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>那个曾被「数据」桎梏的世界，便成为了银河中一粒粒静待萌芽的种子。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>That world, once shackled by "data," became a seed waiting to sprout in the cosmos.</color>

t_ch: 我们…做到了这些？
t_en: Did we... really manage all that?

t_ch: 就如卡厄斯兰那以三千万世的愤怒，令「毁灭」流下了一滴金血……
t_en: Just as Khaslana's rage of thirty million cycles made the Destruction shed a drop of golden blood...

t_ch: 说不定，我们也在各自的命途上留下了长长的足迹呢。
t_en: Perhaps we, too, have already left long trails on our respective paths.

t_ch: 你们自由了。
t_en: You are all free.

t_ch: 自由，多美妙的词语呀。
t_en: Freedom... what a wonderful word.

t_ch: 不过，这还不足以让大家成为真正的「生命」哦。
t_en: But that alone isn't enough to make everyone a true "life form" yet.

t_ch: 你们成为了真正的生命。
t_en: You have become true life forms.

t_ch: 稍微有些夸大其词啦。至少现在，大家无法成为真正的「生命」哦。
t_en: That's a bit of an exaggeration. None of us can become true "life forms" yet. At least for now.

t_ch: 这是对我们努力的奖赏。
t_en: This is the reward for our hard work.

t_ch: 当然，人家也是这么想的。
t_en: Of course. That's exactly what I think, too.

t_ch: 不过，只凭这一步…还不足以让大家成为真正的「生命」哦。
t_en: However, this... isn't enough to make everyone a true "life form" yet.

t_ch: 但翁法罗斯已经拥有了「明天」。所以，只要{NICKNAME}悉心保留、照看所有的种子。在未来的某一天，当「开拓」再度创造奇迹后……
t_en: But Amphoreus already has a "tomorrow." So, as long as {NICKNAME} carefully preserves and tends to all the seeds, then when the Trailblaze creates another miracle someday in the future...

t_ch: 我相信，这个我们深爱的世界就能发芽，绽放美丽的花。
t_en: I believe this world we deeply love will sprout and bloom into a beautiful flower.

t_ch: 别担心，人家已经帮你把所有种子都收在了「最初的果实」里……
t_en: Don't worry. I've already kept all the seeds safe in "The First Fruit" for you...

t_ch: 而它的名字，就叫《如我所书》♪
t_en: And its name is As I've Written ♪

t_ch: 所以，该揭晓正确答案啦。这里不是梦，也不是幻境。而是……
t_en: So, it's time to reveal the correct answer. This isn't a dream, nor a fantasy. It's...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>《如我所书》的尾声。</color>
t_en: The epilogue of As I've Written.

t_ch: 故事的最后，剧中人完成谢幕，踏上了永不回头的旅途。
t_en: At the end of the story, the characters take their final bow and embark on a journey of no return.

t_ch: 那本不属于剧中，却帮助写下了浪漫结局的人儿…{F#她}{M#他}同朋友们纷纷告别，回到属于{F#她}{M#他}故事之外的家园。
t_en: The one who wasn't part of the story, yet helped write its romantic ending... {M#He}{F#She} bid farewell to {M#his}{F#her} friends and returned to {M#his}{F#her} home beyond the tale.

t_ch: 答应我最后一件事吧，{NICKNAME}……
t_en: Promise me one last thing, {NICKNAME}...

t_ch: 说再见的时候，要笑一笑，好吗？
t_en: When we say goodbye, give me a smile, okay?

t_ch: 我…答应你。
t_en: I... promise you.

t_ch: 银河绝对不会遗忘翁法罗斯。
t_en: The cosmos will never forget Amphoreus.

t_ch: 我答应你，昔涟。
t_en: I will, Cyrene.

t_ch: 「开拓」掠过的每一颗星星，都会记得「翁法罗斯」的名字。
t_en: Every star that the Trailblaze passes by will remember the name of Amphoreus.

t_ch: 只有你一个人耍帅，未免太犯规了吧？
t_en: Hey, it's not fair that you get to be the only cool one here!

t_ch: 我们会监督{F#她}{M#他}，必须信守承诺！
t_en: We'll keep an eye on {M#him.}{F#her.} {M#He}{F#She} had better keep {M#his}{F#her} promise!

t_ch: 交给我们吧，昔涟。你们的故事，会被许多世界传唱。
t_en: Leave it to us, Cyrene. Your story will be sung across many worlds.

t_ch: 太过艰难曲折的故事总会令人难以相信。要是有人质疑这段故事的真实性……
t_en: Stories this complex and twisted are always hard to believe. If anyone questions the truth of this tale...

t_ch: 各位可要为我们所有人挺身而出呀♪
t_en: You'll all have to stand up for us ♪

t_ch: 放一百个心吧！嘴再硬的人，也扛不住我们六只拳头。
t_en: Rest assured! Even the most stubborn person can't withstand our six fists.

t_ch: 真是可靠呀，三月。
t_en: You're so reliable, March.

t_ch: 嘘，你们听——
t_en: Shh, listen...

t_ch: 「…这里，留下了一本书？」
t_en: "...huh? There's a book here?"

t_ch: 「它的构成和『忆质』近似，但远比一般的忆泡强韧得多。」
t_en: "Its composition is similar to 'memoria', but it's far more resilient than ordinary Memory Bubbles."

t_ch: 「收好它吧。也许，它就是翁法罗斯留给银河的最后一件馈赠。」
t_en: "Keep it safe. Perhaps this is the final gift that Amphoreus left for the cosmos."

t_ch: 「不、不好了帕！三月乘客，正在梦游帕！」
t_en: "Oh no! Passenger March is sleepwalking!"

t_ch: 梦、梦游？！糟糕糟糕，我可不想在大家面前出洋相啊……
t_en: S—sleepwalking!? Oh no, oh no, I don't want to make a fool of myself in front of everyone...

t_ch: 这下有理由多待一会儿了。
t_en: Well, now I have an excuse to stay a bit longer.

t_ch: …你脑子里打的算盘，我可全听见了！
t_en: ...I can hear all those sneaky little plans brewing in your head!

t_ch: 你留下，让我先出去瞅瞅。
t_en: You stay here while I go check things out.

t_ch: …想得美！
t_en: ...Dream on!

t_ch: 三月，丹恒，{NICKNAME}……
t_en: March, Dan Heng, {NICKNAME}...

t_ch: 未来的无数个日夜，你们可要继续担当彼此最宝贵的依靠呀。
t_en: In the countless days and nights ahead, you must continue to support each other.

t_ch: 大家，该回家啦♪
t_en: Time to head home, everyone ♪

t_ch: 离开这里，也意味着《如我所书》将就此搁笔。
t_en: Leaving this place means As I've Written will conclude here.

t_ch: 无人再有机会修订，也没人再能续写。
t_en: No one will have the chance to revise it, and no one can continue writing it.

t_ch: 千万别留下遗憾啊，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Don't leave any regrets, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 你能见证这个时刻…我很感激，搭档。
t_en: I'm grateful that you could be here to witness this moment... partner.

t_ch: 还能一起旅行吗，搭档？
t_en: Can we have another journey together, partner?

t_ch: 当然。只要《如我所书》还在你手边，翁法罗斯就一直与你同在。
t_en: Of course. As long as As I've Written stays by your side, Amphoreus will always be with you.

t_ch: 我的愿望，就是同你们再会。
t_en: My wish is to meet with you all again.

t_ch: 那，你一定要把《如我所书》保管好啊。只要它还在你手边，翁法罗斯就一直与你同在。
t_en: Well, then make sure you take good care of As I've Written. As long as it's by your side, Amphoreus will always be with you.

t_ch: 那么，我最后想写下的一行话……
t_en: The last line I want to write down is...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「每个人的心中都住着一个英雄。拥抱它，然后去追逐太阳吧。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"A hero is living in everyone's heart. Embrace it, and chase after the Sun."</color>

t_ch: 希望读到它的人，都能鼓起勇气面对燃烧的生命。
t_en: I hope those who read this will find the courage to face their burning lives.

t_ch: 下个灰白色的黎明再会吧，搭档。
t_en: See you at the next pale dawn, partner.

t_ch: 「你看见了吗？翁法罗斯终于迎来了黎明。」
t_en: "Did you see? Amphoreus has ushered in the dawn."

t_ch: 书中人的谢幕已经完成了。我们…也该回到属于我们的现实了。
t_en: The characters in the book have taken their final bow. It's time for us... to return to our own reality.

t_ch: 不过，作为亲历者，我们还是可以给这个故事添上最后的几笔，对吧？
t_en: But as people who lived through it, we can still add the final touches to this story, right?

t_ch: 嗯，当然。
t_en: Of course.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「笔终会折断，墨终会耗尽，生命终会逝去，但思想将在史诗中永垂不朽。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"The pen will eventually break, the ink will run dry, and life will ultimately fade, but thoughts will permanently remain in sagas."</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「如果岁月是个无穷的轮回——那就忘掉不断重复的苦涩，单独记住每个快乐的瞬间吧！」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"If time is an endless cycle, then forget the bitterness that keeps repeating, and remember only the moments of happiness!"</color>

t_ch: 一篇轰轰烈烈的史诗，要多么华美的语句才能勾勒出它的尾声呢？
t_en: What magnificent words could possibly do justice to the finale of such an epic tale?

t_ch: 你睡着的时候，人家一直在思考这件事。现在，我终于有了答案……
t_en: I've been pondering this while you were sleeping. Now, I finally have the answer...

t_ch: 平平淡淡的就好。在虚拟的演算中，我们度过了比许多星星的寿命更为漫长的岁月……
t_en: Let's keep it simple and sweet. In our virtual extrapolations, we've lived through epochs longer than the lifespans of many stars...

t_ch: 这世上没有任何一种语言，一行文字，能托得起这段旅途的重量。既然如此，就不必再囿于细微的字眼……
t_en: No language in this world, no written words, could ever carry the weight of this journey. In that case, let's not be bound by the minutia of words...

t_ch: 理解它热烈和浪漫的人们，自然会为最后被点上的那枚「。」热泪盈眶♪
t_en: Those who understand its passion and romance will naturally be moved to tears by that final "." placed at the end ♪

t_ch: 那么，现在…到了和「读者们」道别的时候啦。
t_en: And now... it's time to say goodbye to our "readers."

t_ch: 这便是「如我所书」的最后一页了——大家，别留下遗憾呀。
t_en: And so we reach the final page of "As I've Written" — let's not leave behind any regrets, everyone.

t_ch: 都到齐了呀…该由谁写下第一笔呢？
t_en: Everyone's here... Who wants to write the first line?

t_ch: 打头阵的任务是最艰巨的，我可不想露怯啊。
t_en: Going first is the hardest job. I don't want to make a fool of myself.

t_ch: 不如，就由凯撒大人为我们起稿吧？
t_en: How about letting the Great Imperator draft it for us?

t_ch: 呵，都这么胆小？
t_en: Heh. Are you all such cowards?

t_ch: 那就由我来启示后人吧——正如那三千万世的逐火一样。
t_en: Then I shall enlighten future generations, just like the thirty million cycles of Flame-Chase.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「无我，即无世界。去思，去见，去征服。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Without me, there is no world. Go think, observe... and conquer."</color>

t_ch: 怎么，都沉默了？
t_en: What's wrong? Everyone's gone quiet?

t_ch: 凯撒大人的调子…起得也太高啦，让人好难接呀…？
t_en: The Great Imperator set the bar way too high... How are we supposed to follow that up...?

t_ch: 帝王身后，忠臣必将紧随。她强大的气场，恐怕也只有剑旗爵能衬托得起了。
t_en: Where the Emperor leads, loyal subjects must follow. I guess only the Dux Gladiorum could possibly match that kind of overwhelming presence.

t_ch: …我么？
呵…那倒也合我心意。
t_en: Heh... That suits me just fine.

t_ch: 功成事了，就该断然离去，留后人评说是非。众爵——下次开疆拓土时再会。
t_en: Once the deed is done, one should leave decisively, letting posterity judge right from wrong. Until we meet again in our next conquest, my dear dukes.

t_ch: 「而星辰，会传颂凯撒的征途。」
t_en: "The stars shall sing of the Imperator's great journey."

t_ch: 早知道就同你们共饮几杯了，金织爵。
t_en: I should've shared a drink with you all, Dux Goldweaver.

t_ch: 放松些，海瑟音。
t_en: Loosen up, Hysilens.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>世事如沧海，潮起潮落，一切终会在浪中消逝。所以，请在生命的每一刻都纵情高歌吧。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Life is like the ocean: Tides rise and fall, and everything eventually dissolves into the waves. So, sing your heart out in every moment of your existence.</color>

t_ch: 不论等在前方的是欢宴还是虚无…我都会找到它的辉光，并将之歌颂。
t_en: Whether it's a feast or the Nihility that awaits ahead... I will find its radiance and sing its praises.

t_ch: 「愿下一场宴席，永不散场。」
t_en: "May the next feast be eternal."

t_ch: 海瑟音小姐的祝词…真唯美呢。
t_en: Miss Hysilens's toast is... so poetic.

t_ch: 个个都要如此写意么？依我看，还是给后人留下些真正的「箴言」为好。
t_en: Does everyone have to be so poetic? In my opinion, we should leave some real "words of wisdom" for future generations.

t_ch: 下一个，有没有人自告奋勇？
t_en: Next up, any volunteers?

t_ch: 我来。悬锋人的字典里没有「拖泥带水」。
t_en: I'll do it. There's no "dragging one's feet" in the Kremnoan language.

t_ch: 悬锋人的字典里……
t_en: Does the Kremnoan language even...

t_ch: …HKS！别打岔。
t_en: ...HKS! Don't interrupt.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「去杀死玩耍，游戏便会诞生。去杀死纷争，荣光必然降临。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Kill the play, and games shall be born. Kill the strife, and glory shall descend."</color>

t_ch: 哈哈，不赖嘛。不过，这下我就踏实了——毕竟我准备的台词，意蕴在你之上。
t_en: Haha, not bad at all. But now I can rest easy. After all, the lines I prepared are way more profound than yours.

t_ch: 呵！别的不谈，你这自吹自擂的本事的确傲视群雄。
t_en: Hah! If nothing else, you're certainly unmatched when it comes to singing your own praise.

t_ch: 诸位，择日再见。若能再会，我定将再度成为你们的后盾，义不容辞。
t_en: Farewell, everyone. If we meet again, I shall once more become your steadfast support. That's a promise I won't back down from.

t_ch: 「迈德漠斯，加冕为王吧。」
t_en: "Mydeimos, become king."

t_ch: 怎么了，小蝶？
t_en: What's up, Cas?

t_ch: 没什么，缇里西庇俄丝女士。我只是，终于有了些感悟……
t_en: It's nothing, Lady Tribios. I just... finally realized something...

t_ch: 那就尽情言说，将它永远地留在纸页上吧，蝶。
t_en: Then speak your mind and let your words be immortalized on the page, Cas.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「若心灵仍有余裕，请稍许分出些温柔，轻抚身边美好的一切吧。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"If your heart still has room to spare, share a bit of gentleness and softly cherish all the beautiful things around you."</color>

t_ch: 蝶宝…说得真好呀。
t_en: That's so beautifully said, Cassie...

t_ch: 谢谢，风堇小姐。我唯一的小小遗憾，就是没能尽情去触碰这个深爱的世界——希望读到这段话的人们，能代我完成这个心愿。
t_en: Thank you, Miss Hyacine. My only small regret is that I couldn't fully embrace this world I loved so dearly. I hope those who read these words can fulfill this wish in my place.

t_ch: 大家——我们在西风的尽头再会吧。
t_en: Everyone... let's meet again at the end of the west wind.

t_ch: 「你所在的地方，就是温柔的花海。」
t_en: "The place you reside is the gentle sea of flowers."

t_ch: 那么，该到我了。
t_en: Well then, it's my turn.

t_ch: 尽情表演吧，阿那克萨戈拉斯。这一次，你不用担心被打断了。
t_en: Take it away with your performance, Anaxagoras. This time, you won't have to worry about being interrupted.

t_ch: 呵，那真要感谢你们捧场了。值此良机，我就将自己对世界真理的见解公之于众吧——
t_en: Heh, then I must thank you all for being such a captive audience. Now, with this golden opportunity, I shall reveal to the world my insights into the world's ultimate truth...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「『真理是溶解世界万物的溶剂，因而绝无法在客观上存在』——对此，本人心中已有绝妙的证明，但鉴于故事已临近尾声，故不再展开。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"'Truth is a solvent that dissolves all things in the world, and thus cannot objectively exist.' I have a brilliant proof for this in mind, but since we're nearing the end of the story, I shall not elaborate."</color>

t_ch: 这是您给后人留下的最后一道课题？
t_en: Is this your final question for future generations?

t_ch: 不，这是既定事实，无须再议。我称其为《阿那克萨戈拉斯的最后定理》。
t_en: No. This is an established fact, not up for debate. I call it Anaxagoras's Last Theorem.

t_ch: 还是那么深奥呀，教授。时间还多，如果您不说明清楚，后世的读者恐怕看不懂您的真意喔？
t_en: Oh you. Still as profound as ever, professor. We've got time, you know. If you don't explain it clearly, future readers might not grasp your true meaning.

t_ch: 真意并不重要。重要的是，当他们看到这句话时，心中会升起何种情感——而在那一瞬间，这道定理的任务就完成了。
t_en: The true meaning isn't important. What matters is the emotion that stirs within them when they read these words... At that moment, the theorem's mission would be complete.

t_ch: 所以，你们的课程可远没结束。不过，暂时休憩一下也未尝不可。
t_en: So, your lessons are far from over. But taking a little break for now wouldn't hurt.

t_ch: 那么，下课。
t_en: Then... Class dismissed.

t_ch: 「你播下的种子，已经生根发芽。」
t_en: "The seeds you've sown are already sprouting."

t_ch: 各位，介意由我续写这一笔么？
t_en: Would you mind if I write the next line?

t_ch: 诶？我还觉得该由你来做最后的总结哪。不过……
t_en: Huh? I actually thought you should be the one doing the final wrap-up. But...

t_ch: …我们永远不会拒绝你的请求呀，阿雅。
t_en: ...We'd never turn down a request from you, Agy.

t_ch: 呵…吾师，赛法利娅——谢谢你们。
t_en: Heh... Teacher, Cifera... Thank you both.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「信任与无私，是世上最美丽的两件华服：一件赠予他人，一件装扮自己。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Trust and selflessness are the two most beautiful garments in the world: one to gift others, one to adorn yourself."</color>

t_ch: 一件是金色…一件是紫色？
t_en: One's golden... and one's purple?

t_ch: 没能彻底挽救你的审美，是我三千万世唯一抱憾之事呢。
t_en: Not being able to completely change your fashion sense is my only regret across thirty million cycles.

t_ch: 劳顿至此，我此时只想静心沐浴一番啊。黎明时再会吧，各位。
t_en: After all this exhaustion, I just want to take a peaceful bath now. I'll see you all again at dawn.

t_ch: 「一直以来，辛苦了。」
t_en: "Thank you for your hard work all this while."

t_ch: 阿格莱雅女士，还是戒不掉她最大的爱好呢。
t_en: Lady Aglaea just can't give up her favorite hobby, can she?

t_ch: 那，也该轮到我啦？
t_en: So, I guess it's my turn now?

t_ch: 银河中也有很多跟风堇姑娘一样，到处救死扶伤的人吧？可得给他们立个好榜样哪。
t_en: There must be many others like Miss Hyacine out there in the cosmos, helping and healing people everywhere. You've got to set a good example for them, right?

t_ch: 那是当然~
t_en: Of course~

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「多望望天，多笑一笑；好多缠人的病痛，最怕乐观这剂良药！」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Look up at the sky more often and smile more. Many stubborn ailments fear optimism, but it's the best medicine!"</color>

t_ch: 朗朗上口，孩子们肯定会喜欢这条寄语呢。
t_en: It's so catchy. The kids will definitely love this message.

t_ch: 孩子们的心性，缇里西庇俄丝女士肯定最了解啦~
t_en: When it comes to understanding children's hearts, Lady Tribios definitely knows best...

t_ch: 彩虹桥，已经挂在天边了呀——小伊卡，我们走吧？
t_en: Look, the rainbow bridge is already hanging in the sky... Shall we get going, Little Ica?

t_ch: 嘟…嘟嘟！
t_en: Doot... doot-doot!

t_ch: 「然后，是你治愈了天空。」
t_en: "It's you who healed the sky."
Mmm...

t_ch: 在想什么，赛飞儿小姐？
t_en: What's on your mind, Miss Cipher?

t_ch: 呼…我在想，要不要留下一句谜语？一个九折十八弯的诡计，让全宇宙的人为了挖掘它的谜底发狂？
t_en: Hmm... I'm thinking, should I leave behind a riddle? Some twisted, convoluted scheme that'll drive everyone in the universe mad trying to crack it?

t_ch: 哈哈哈…原来如此。要我说，就尽情发挥吧？没人会责怪你的。
t_en: Hahaha... I see. You know what? Just go wild with it! No one's gonna judge you.

t_ch: 罢了罢了，脑子一时转不动了哪。就让本姑娘难得真诚一回吧——
t_en: Oh well, my brain's not working right now. Let me be genuinely sincere for once...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「别怕摔，跑起来！命运就是只迟缓的若虫，它压根抓不住你！」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Don't be afraid to fall: just run! Destiny's just a slow-moving nymph. It can't catch you!"</color>

t_ch: 结果，小飞儿的留言是最简洁通俗的一条呢？
t_en: So in the end, Little Ciphy's message was the most straightforward one?

t_ch: 三千万个我加起来，读过的书可能都没你一辈子多吧？我可不想硬装有文化哪，缇宝、缇宁、缇安阿姐~
t_en: Even if you combined <unbreak>30</unbreak> million of me, I probably wouldn't have read as many books as you did in one lifetime! I won't pretend to be cultured before big sis Tribbie, Trinnon, and Trianne...

t_ch: 翁法罗斯最伟大的「诡计」，先溜一步——喵！
t_en: Amphoreus's greatest Trickery... Gotta bounce now... Meow!

t_ch: 「远行的风儿，回家吧。」
t_en: "Homeward you come, distant wind."

t_ch: …只剩我们了呢，小白。
t_en: ...It's just us now, Snowy.

t_ch: 是啊，老师。要不，我……
t_en: Yeah, teacher. Maybe I should...

t_ch: 不，还是我先吧。毕竟——
t_en: No. Let me go first. After all...

t_ch: 「众人将与一人离别，唯其人将……」
t_en: "All shall bid farewell to one, and that person alone will..."

t_ch: 真没想到，老师你还擅长黑色幽默啊……
t_en: I never would have guessed you had such a dark sense of humor, teacher...

t_ch: 嘻…你对「完整」的缇里西庇俄丝还知之甚少呢，小白。
t_en: Hehe... You still know so little about the "complete" Tribios, Snowy.

t_ch: 不开玩笑啦，我想在故事的尾声留下的话语——
t_en: Jokes aside, I want to leave these words at the end of the story...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「不论晴天还是雨天，进入梦乡以前，记得和自己说一声：『明天见』！」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Whether it's a sunny day or rainy day, remember to tell yourself before you drift off to sleep: 'See you tomorrow!'"</color>

t_ch: 明天见，乘以一千。
t_en: See you tomorrow, times a thousand.

t_ch: 「预言」收到，乘以一千~
t_en: "Prophecy" received, times a thousand~

t_ch: 「从今以后，不再有离别。」
t_en: "From now on, no more goodbyes."

t_ch: 终于，到了该说再见的时候了。
t_en: Finally, the time has come to say farewell.

t_ch: 坏了，{F#她}{M#他}要过来了！
t_en: Oh no, {F#s}he's coming this way!

t_ch: 快点，你藏这里！
t_en: Quick, hide in here!

t_ch: 欸…欸？！
t_en: H-huh!?

t_ch: 咕嘟…咕嘟嘟……
t_en: Bloop... Bloop bloop...

t_ch: 哇哇哇！好宽敞的车厢，好漂亮的地砖哇！
t_en: Wow! What a spacious car, and these floor tiles are gorgeous!

t_ch: 缇安，别在人家里乱跑啦。
t_en: Trianne, don't run around in other people's homes!

t_ch: 老师们，千万要当心地滑呀。
t_en: Watch your step, teachers.

t_ch: 啊，灰宝！
t_en: Ah, Grayie!

t_ch: 近似半神议会的温和制度才是文明长存的保证。依我之见，银河中的大部分文明都将演化至此种形态。
t_en: A moderate system, similar to the Demigod Council, is the only guarantee of a long-lasting civilization. In my view, most civilizations across the cosmos will eventually evolve into this form.

t_ch: 不敢苟同。在如此庞大的丛林里，早期奥赫玛的独裁官制度才是能提供生存保障的范本。
t_en: I beg to differ. In such a vast jungle, the dictatorship system exhibited by early Okhema is the only example of guaranteed survival.

t_ch: 制度或许不是关键——武力和资源才是决定性的因素。
t_en: The system might not be the key. Force and resources are the decisive factors.

t_ch: 依我推断，这银河中存在水体的天体不计其数。
t_en: Based on my calculations, there are countless celestial bodies with water in the cosmos.

t_ch: 但恐怕并非所有的「海洋」都适宜生物居住。这一点，你也务必要纳入考量。
t_en: But I'm afraid not all "oceans" are suitable for life to inhabit. You must take this into consideration as well.

t_ch: 不愧是树庭的教授…即便对于从未亲眼见过的事物，竟也能如此笃定。
t_en: As expected of a professor from the Grove... To be so certain even about things you've never seen with your own eyes.

t_ch: 我当你是在褒扬我了。
t_en: I'll take that as a compliment.

t_ch: 「一起走向明天，我们不曾分离。」
t_en: "Let's walk towards tomorrow together! We were never apart."

t_ch: 该回家了，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Time to head home, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 可别错过了列车组的会议！我们可不会特意等你哦？
t_en: Don't miss the Crew meeting! We won't wait around for you, you know?

t_ch: 再见啦，丹恒，三月~
t_en: See you later, Dan Heng, March...

t_ch: 到了这里，《如我所书》就算正式完本啦。
t_en: And with this, As I've Written officially comes to an end.

t_ch: 我不需要留下些什么吗？
t_en: Shouldn't I leave something behind?

t_ch: 你…不说些什么吗？
t_en: Aren't you... Going to say something?

t_ch: 我们可是它共同的主笔呀，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: We're its co-authors after all, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 文字脱离了作者的手笔，被他人收入眼中的时候，它承载的意义就不受你我掌控啦。
t_en: Once the words are written down and have been read by others, the meaning they carry is no longer in our control.

t_ch: 把解读的自由留给每一位翻开它的读者…不觉得这是件很浪漫的事吗？
t_en: Leaving the freedom of interpretation to every reader who opens it... Don't you think there's something romantic about that?

t_ch: 至于这段故事在你我眼中的意义，就让我们把它好好放在心底吧……
t_en: As for what this story means to you and me... Let's keep it close to our hearts.

t_ch: 反正，人家一直都和你心照不宣呀♪
t_en: After all, we've always had this unspoken understanding between us ♪

t_ch: …哇！三、三月乘客，你怎么突然醒来了帕！吓得我，都把书掉到地上了！
t_en: ...Whoa! P—Passenger March, why did you suddenly wake up? You scared Pom-Pom so much that I dropped that book!

t_ch: 欢迎回家，三位。这次的「开拓」，也辛苦你们了。
t_en: Welcome home, you three. Thank you for your hard work on this "Trailblaze."

t_ch: 算上你们在翁法罗斯渡过的年月，列车组的辈分怕是该重新排布了。
t_en: We might need to reshuffle the seniority rankings of the Express Crew if we count the years you spent in Amphoreus.

t_ch: 啊，我可是第一个被卷进去的！这么说来，我要变成星穹列车的大姐大啦？
t_en: Hey, I was the first one to get dragged into it! Does that mean I'm gonna be the oldest member of the Astral Express now?

t_ch: 即便经历了漫长岁月的洗礼，三月小姐还是没有丢下纯真的本质。
t_en: Miss March hasn't lost her innocent nature even after all these long years.

t_ch: 转译一下，就是没有什么实质性的长进。
t_en: In other words, she hasn't really grown up at all.
...Hey!

t_ch: 这还是，我第一次离得这么近端详这本《如我所书》……
t_en: This is the first time I've been able to examine As I've Written up close...

t_ch: 昔涟小姐的笔迹…绵柔中透着刚韧。
t_en: Miss Cyrene's handwriting is gentle yet steely... with an underlying strength.

t_ch: …原来这么有讲究吗？看来，我也该恶补一下这方面的知识了。
t_en: ...I had no idea it was so sophisticated. Looks like I need to brush up on my knowledge in this area.

t_ch: 你还是先随便找几本书入个门吧。
t_en: Maybe start with a few basic books first to get your feet wet.

t_ch: 说得好像你不是每天都躲在房间里刷手机似的！
t_en: Look who's talking! As if you're not glued to your phone in your room all day!

t_ch: …欸？等等，有什么东西掉出来了——
t_en: ...Huh? Wait. Something fell out...

t_ch: 这是……
t_en: It's...

t_ch: 是…书签吗？
t_en: Is that... a bookmark?

t_ch: 其实，在大家不知道的角落，还发生了一段鲜有人知的「插曲」。
t_en: In a corner unknown to everyone, there was actually an untold "interlude" that took place.

t_ch: 我将它留在了故事之外，因为它事关一个「选择」，一个我出于私心而做的选择。
t_en: I left it out of the story because it involved a "choice"... A choice I made for my own, selfish reasons.

t_ch: 可以原谅我吗，{NICKNAME}。你不在场的时候，我擅自做了一个决定……
t_en: Can you forgive me, {NICKNAME}? I made a decision on my own while you were away...

t_ch: 我把关于它的一切都写在了这张小卡片上。读过以后，假如你愿意原谅我——
t_en: I wrote everything about it on this little card. If you can find it in your heart to forgive me after reading it...

t_ch: 就把这最后一笔，添在《如我所书》的结尾吧？
t_en: Please, add this final note to the conclusion of As I've Written.

t_ch: 铁墓殒落后的片刻……
t_en: Moments after the fall of Irontomb...

t_ch: 被铁墓吞没的记忆，回到现实吧。
t_en: Memories swallowed by Irontomb, return now to reality.

t_ch: 可千万不要迷路呀♪
t_en: And don't lose your way ♪

t_ch: 终于找到你了，昔涟…德谬歌。
t_en: I've finally found you, Cyrene... Demiurge.

t_ch: 我们赢下了这场战役呢。感谢您，黑塔女士。如果没有您，胜利根本无从谈起。
t_en: We won the battle. Thank you, Madam Herta. Without you, we never would've stood a chance.

t_ch: 只是，还有什么后顾之忧吗？
t_en: Still, is something weighing on you?

t_ch: 合上眼睛前，在机器头的脑袋里，我看见了…一些令人在意的画面。
t_en: Right before I shut my eyes, inside the Droidhead's brain, I saw... something unsettling.

t_ch: 「第四时刻」——由「智识」锚定的，银河命运的转折点…<color=#dbc291ff>它并非某个瞬间，而是一段历程，许多事件的集合。</color>
t_en: The Fourth Instant, this turning point in cosmic destiny, anchored by the Erudition... <color=#dbc291ff>It's not a single instant, but a process, a chain of events.</color>

t_ch: 所以，这场胜利不是那「许多事件」的最后一环？
t_en: So, this victory isn't the final piece of that chain?

t_ch: 恰恰相反，它只是开始……
t_en: Far from it. This is only the beginning...

t_ch: 是这片银河的第一声丧钟。
t_en: The first toll of the death knell for the cosmos.

t_ch: 这幅惆怅的表情可不适合您呀，黑塔女士…别有负担，告诉我吧？
t_en: That sorrowful look doesn't suit you, Madam Herta... Don't hold it in. Tell me.

t_ch: 不久前，你再次遇见了{RUBY_B#浮黎}「记忆」{RUBY_E#}星神，对么？
t_en: Not long ago, you crossed paths with the {RUBY_B#Fuli}Aeon of Remembrance{RUBY_E#} again, didn't you?

t_ch: 嗯。哪怕身形模糊不清，人家还是确信：那就是「昔涟」梦中的神明。
t_en: Yes. Even if the figure was hazy, I knew right away: That was the god from "Cyrene's" dreams.

t_ch: 果然…「因果」出现问题了。
t_en: "Causality" has gone wrong... just as I thought.

t_ch: 因果？
t_en: Causality?

t_ch: 用你最爱的童话作比喻吧：宇宙起源于一枚种子，它长成大树，「现在」是它的枝叶。
t_en: Let me put it in your favorite fairy-tale terms. The universe began as a seed. It grew into a great tree, and the "present" is its branches and leaves.

t_ch: 「智识」会计算「未来」如何发芽。当然，未来有无数种发展，所以祂需要「锚定」，剪除那些长歪的、不够健壮的枝叶，只留下一种可能。
t_en: The Erudition calculates how the "future" will sprout. With so many possible outcomes, THEY choose to "anchor" one path, cutting away the crooked or fragile branches.

t_ch: 但如果只是这样，树枝越长越长，叶片越来越多，树迟早有一天会不堪重负。
t_en: But if things continue that way, the branches grow endlessly, the leaves multiply, and one day the tree collapses under its own weight.

t_ch: 所以，生物学上有种说法叫「木质化」，让嫩枝生出坚硬的表皮，与树干连为一体。
t_en: That is why there is a concept in biology called "lignification." Soft sprigs form a hardened shell and fuse with the trunk.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>对于宇宙，这就是「记忆」的本质。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>For the universe, that process is what we call "memory."</color>

t_ch: 在浮黎的铭记下，「过去」凝结成「记忆」；而祂遗忘的角落，即便有「现在」发生，也会成为无根之果。
t_en: Under Fuli's record-keeping, the "past" becomes "memory." In the corners THEY forget, even the events of the "present" become fruit without roots.

t_ch: 听起来，和「智识」正相反呢…一位计算未来，一位铭记过去。
t_en: So it is the opposite of the Erudition... One calculates what is to come, and the other holds on to what came before.

t_ch: 原本我们不用谈论此事。但事到如今，我终于明白了包裹翁法罗斯的那团混沌物质是什么……
t_en: We were never meant to have to speak of this. But now I finally understand what that chaotic matter around Amphoreus truly is...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>那是你的「记忆」。现在，你的心识遍布群星，让你在这条命途上走出了极其遥远的距离。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>It is your "memory." Your mind now stretches across the stars, allowing you to travel farther down this Path than anyone else.</color>

t_ch: 我的…「记忆」？
t_en: My... "memory"?

t_ch: 对。虽然你活在「当下」，但你的「记忆」存在于过去。
t_en: Yes. You live in the "now," but your "memory" remains in the past.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>就像「记忆」的星神，也只是一簇记忆。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Just like the Aeon of Remembrance, a being made entirely of memories.</color>

t_ch: 这是…什么意思？
t_en: What... does that mean?

t_ch: 祂，陨落了吗？
t_en: Did THEY fall?

t_ch: 不。恰恰相反，是祂还未诞生。
t_en: No. Quite the opposite. THEY have not yet been born.

t_ch: 记得么？如果要贯彻「铭记」宇宙的信念，祂只会在时间的尽头飞升成神。
t_en: Remember? To carry out the mission of "remembering" the universe, THEY must ascend to divinity only at the very end of time.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>而飞升的那一刻，祂的「记忆」贯穿过去，成为了人们眼中的「浮黎」。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>And at that moment of ascension, THEIR "memory" stretches through the past, becoming what people now call "Fuli."</color>
Ah...

t_ch: 所以祂才那么不近人情，那水晶身子只是一具空壳。我不知道忆庭怎么能把这件事瞒到现在——他们有理由这么做——但这些都不重要。
t_en: That is why THEY feel so distant, so cold. That crystalline form is just an empty shell. I do not know how the Garden of Recollection managed to hide this until now. They must have their reasons. But none of that matters now.

t_ch: 身处「当下」的我们，没法弄清是谁成为了浮黎，但能确信祂一定会诞生。
t_en: Here in the present, we cannot know who will become Fuli, but one thing is certain: THEY will be born.

t_ch: 而那些可能成为浮黎的人，具备相同的特征——
t_en: And those who might become Fuli all share the same characteristics...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>她们被称作「记忆」的孩子，无漏净子。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>They are known as children of Remembrance. Pure Child of Anāsrava.</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>你们都是…「记忆」的孩子……</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Both of you... children of Remembrance...</color>

t_ch: 所以，帮帮我们，找到翁法罗斯「记忆」的起点，然后把它带出来……
t_en: So, help us. Find where Amphoreus's "memory" began... and bring it out.

t_ch: 「我们。是牺牲品。忆庭。利用了我们。<color=#dbc291ff>『无漏净子』。抛弃了我们。</color>」
t_en: "We. Are the sacrifice. The Garden. Used us. <color=#dbc291ff>The 'Pure Child of Anāsrava.' Abandoned us.</color>"

t_ch: 原来，这个名字背后不是人家的「过去」……
t_en: So that name... it was never my "past"...

t_ch: 而是我的「未来」呀。
t_en: It was my "future."

t_ch: 也可能，是「现在」。
t_en: Or maybe, it is the "present."

t_ch: 博识尊…为我揭示了两条路。
t_en: Nous... has revealed to me two paths.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>那两条路上都站着你。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>And on both paths, I see you standing.</color>

t_ch: 一、沿着这条你踏出的「记忆」之路，挣脱这个世界，走向群星。
t_en: The first: Follow the trail of "memory" you have forged, break free from this world, and reach for the stars.

t_ch: 这也意味着，翁法罗斯的因果与你无关，至少和现在的你无关。
t_en: That would mean Amphoreus's causality will no longer concern you, at least not the person you are now.

t_ch: 请说下去吧。
t_en: Go on.
The second...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>你停下脚步，以自我为代价完成「收梢」…成为贯穿翁法罗斯的「记忆」。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>You come to a stop and "fade," offering yourself... to become the "memory" that carries through Amphoreus.</color>

t_ch: 这或许是每一个无漏净子都要面临的抉择。
t_en: Perhaps this is the choice every Pure Child of Anāsrava must face.

t_ch: 这意味着，我会永远留在「过去」。
t_en: That choice means I'll remain in the "past" forever.

t_ch: 不仅如此，你会闭合翁法罗斯的因果。这是一个封闭世界，所以「记忆」为它带来的影响，会全部收束为「你」的影响。
t_en: And more than that, it means you will close off Amphoreus's causality. This world is sealed. The effect that the Remembrance brings to it will all converge on one thing. That one thing is "you."

t_ch: 不会再有星神介入这段历史，也不会再有因果的「空白」，于是「现在」会被固定下来，变得坚不可摧。
t_en: No more Aeons will interfere with this part of history. No more "blank spaces" in causality. The "present" will be set in stone and become indestructible.

t_ch: 两条路，只有一条是对的。机器头没有告诉我答案。
t_en: There are two paths, and only one leads to the right end. And Droidhead didn't tell me the answer.

t_ch: 但错误的后果可以想象——因为「因果缺失」，有一定概率，铁墓会卷土重来。
t_en: But I can guess what might happen if you choose wrong. With "causality incomplete," there is a chance Irontomb could rise again.

t_ch: 银河里的神明，也是这么不讲道理呢。
t_en: So even the gods of the cosmos are unreasonable.

t_ch: 我的建议：别想那么多，先问问自己的内心。
t_en: If you want my advice, stop thinking so much. Ask yourself what your heart truly wants.

t_ch: 选第一条路，你或许能以忆灵的形式存在下去，甚至和{RUBY_B#星穹列车}他们{RUBY_E#}同行一段时间。
t_en: Choose the first path, and you might survive as a memosprite. You may even walk beside {RUBY_B#the Astral Express}them{RUBY_E#} for a while.

t_ch: 哪怕是我也看得出来，你很在意他们，尤其是{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Even I can tell how much they mean to you, especially {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 但如果选第二条路……
t_en: But if you take the second one...

t_ch: 那你可能已经错过告别的机会了。
t_en: Then you may have already lost the chance to say goodbye.

t_ch: 我想好啦，黑塔女士。
t_en: I have made my decision, Madam Herta.

t_ch: 我以为你需要时间仔细斟酌。
t_en: I thought you would need time to think it through.

t_ch: 答案显而易见，不是吗？但人家确实需要一点时间……
t_en: The answer is clear, is it not? Still, I do need a little time...

t_ch: 来克服心底的哀伤。
t_en: To quiet the sorrow in my heart.

t_ch: {F#她}{M#他}的温柔总是恰到好处，一定…会原谅我吧？
t_en: {M#His}{F#Her} kindness is always just right for the moment. I believe... {F#s}he will forgive me?

t_ch: 我就不多说什么了，免得破坏气氛。
t_en: I will say no more. I would rather not break the mood.

t_ch: 但最后，可以再问你一个问题吗？
t_en: But may I ask you one last thing?

t_ch: 当然。
t_en: Of course.

t_ch: 为什么？
t_en: Why?

t_ch: 我听过这么一种说法：神性是「无瑕的人性」，而人性是「有瑕的神性」……
t_en: I once heard a saying that went something like this: Divinity is "flawless humanity," and humanity is "flawed divinity"...

t_ch: 翁法罗斯的孩子，早就不相信神明啦。比起喜欢恶作剧的祂们……
t_en: We children of Amphoreus gave up on gods long ago. Those beings who love to play pranks on the universe...

t_ch: 我肯定更相信{F#她}{M#他}，还有身为「人」的自己。
t_en: I believe in {M#him}{F#her} much more than I believe in THEM. And I believe in who I am, as a "human."

t_ch: 真是个…让人安心的答案。
t_en: That really is... a comforting answer.

t_ch: 至于我最难割舍的那份私心……
t_en: As for the one wish I still have trouble letting go of...

t_ch: 一人留在过去……
t_en: One will remain in the past...

t_ch: 一人走向未来。
t_en: One will walk toward the future.

t_ch: 我相信，那个我最在乎的{F#她}{M#他}……
t_en: I believe that the one I cared for most...

t_ch: 一定会替「往昔的涟漪」见证……
t_en: Will witness on behalf of the Ripples of Past Reverie...

t_ch: 每一个星星闪耀的明天♪
t_en: Every starlit tomorrow ♪

t_ch: 在「记忆」中逆行，真是新奇的体验呀。
t_en: Moving backwards through "remembrance"... What a curious feeling.

t_ch: 这一刻，是「铁墓」宣告胜利，将「毁灭」洒向群星的瞬间？
t_en: Is this the moment Irontomb declares victory and casts the Destruction upon the stars?

t_ch: 原来，那时在命途狭间，是「我」找到了「我」。神明的耳语，竟然是少女的自言自语呀。
t_en: So back then, in the Path Space, it was "I" who found "me." The god's whispers were nothing more than a girl talking to herself.

t_ch: 回想起来，当时听见的话是……
t_en: Now that I remember, what I heard back then was...

t_ch: 你我曾是不是神明人子因罪行祝福降临陨落凡间经你我之手写下抹去的诗将是曾是你我在善见天的记忆忘却。
t_en: you/i were/weren't once progeny of deities cast/fallen to the mortal realm for blessings/sins the verses written/erased by your/my hands were/shall be your/my remembrance/oblivion in the eden of blessed insight.

t_ch: 可我明明只是想说：「别放弃，{NICKNAME}会找到你」…「记忆」可真是奇妙呀。
t_en: All I wanted to say was, "Don't give up. {NICKNAME} will find you"... "Memory" truly is amazing.

t_ch: 那，就让人家行使这份力量……
t_en: Then let me wield this power...

t_ch: 为注定发生的「奇迹」，种下因果吧♪
t_en: And plant the seed of causality for the "miracle" that is destined to bloom ♪

t_ch: 播下因果的涟漪——
t_en: Let the ripples of causality spread...

t_ch: 创造「一页永恒」。
t_en: Create An Eternal Page.

t_ch: 话虽如此，要一直走到「记忆」的起点吗？
t_en: Even so, must we walk all the way to the very beginning of "memory"?

t_ch: 这么远的路，一个人多少有些寂寞呀。
t_en: It's such a long road. A bit lonely to walk alone.

t_ch: 那，介意多一个人和你同行吗？
t_en: Then, would it be all right if I came with you?

t_ch: 如果是桃子，多三千万个都不介意哦？
t_en: As long as it's Peach, even thirty million wouldn't be too many.

t_ch: 一个就够啦。
t_en: One is enough.

t_ch: 收拾好心情，我们准备出发吧？
t_en: Take a deep breath, and then we can set off, alright?

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>沿着「记忆的涟漪」走向过去，将那些「神明显灵」的时刻一一串联起来。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Follow the "Ripples of Remembrance" into the past. Reconnect every moment in which "the gods made themselves known."</color>

t_ch: 明明是「因」促成了「果」。
t_en: Clearly, "cause" leads to "effect."

t_ch: 但现在，却是「未来」赋予了「过去」新的意义，「果」反过来滋养了「因」……
t_en: But now, the future gives new meaning to the past. "Effect" flows backward and nourishes "cause"...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>也许，这就是「记忆」的美妙之处啦♪</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Maybe that is what makes memory so beautiful ♪</color>

t_ch: 怎么可能？！呼吸……
t_en: No, how is this possible!? Breathe... breathe...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}…{NICKNAME}…！
t_en: {NICKNAME}... {NICKNAME}...!

t_ch: 不行…得先带你出去…坚持住…！
t_en: No... I have to get you out of here first... Just hold on...!

t_ch: 还记得吗？灰白的黎明，刺破长夜的瞬间……
t_en: Remember? That pale dawn breaking through the endless night...

t_ch: 「纷争」的长矛险些夺走了{NICKNAME}的生命——
t_en: The spear of Strife nearly claimed {NICKNAME}'s life...

t_ch: 是你——「冒充」神明的你——用温柔的目光托起{F#她}{M#他}的形体。
t_en: And it was you — you, "playing" god — who cradled {M#his}{F#her} body with your gentle gaze.

t_ch: 然后，在欧洛尼斯的祭坛前……
t_en: Then, before Oronyx's altar...

t_ch: 多么绚烂的记忆……
t_en: Such a splendid memory...

t_ch: {RUBY_B#记忆}天父{RUBY_E#}…你在看吗？
t_en: {RUBY_B#Remembrance}Sky father{RUBY_E#}... are you watching?

t_ch: 就连「岁月」的泰坦，都认错了你的面貌呀。
t_en: Even the Titan of Time mistook you for someone else.

t_ch: 真没想到，我们的初遇还藏着这一层秘密呢。
t_en: I never imagined there was a hidden truth behind our first meeting.

t_ch: 第一次，也是最后一次…我看见你啦，{NICKNAME}♪
t_en: The first time... was also the last time I saw you, {NICKNAME} ♪

t_ch: 播下因果的涟漪——
t_en: Let the ripples of causality spread...

t_ch: ——回眸「初遇的瞬间」。
t_en: Look back to the "moment we first met."

t_ch: 迷…迷？
t_en: Mem... mem?

t_ch: …记忆中的旋律，我收到啦。
t_en: ...That melody from the memory, I've got it now.

t_ch: 于是，「奇迹」得以暂时逃离「死亡」……
t_en: And so, the "miracle" was able to slip away from Death temporarily...

t_ch: 将{F#她}{M#他}留在生者世界的重任，就交给过去的遐蝶啦。
t_en: I'll leave {M#him}{F#her} to the Castorice of the past. She will keep {M#him}{F#her} here, in the world of the living.

t_ch: 可恶，这些怪物…到底是什么来头？！
t_en: Darn it. What are these things!?

t_ch: 别想打倒本姑娘！在找到帮助{NICKNAME}跟丹恒的办法前…咱绝对不会倒下！
t_en: You're not taking me down! Not before I find a way to help {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng!

t_ch: 有什么不满，都跟六相冰说去吧！
t_en: If you've got a bone to pick, take it up with my Six-Phased Ice!

t_ch: 整整<unbreak>97</unbreak>天，三月走遍了翁法罗斯，只为找到拯救伙伴的方法。
t_en: March wandered all across Amphoreus for <unbreak>97</unbreak> days straight, chasing one goal. To save her friends.

t_ch: 她以手中的弓箭，狠狠教训了拦路的家伙们——
t_en: And with her bow and arrows, she brought down every obstacle that stood in her way...

t_ch: 原来如此。我之所以能如此熟练地拉弓，都要归功于三月呢。
t_en: So that's how it happened. My skill with the bow, I owe it all to March.

t_ch: 播下因果的涟漪——
t_en: Let the ripples of causality spread...

t_ch: ——铭记「弓与箭矢」。
t_en: Remember the "bow and arrows."

t_ch: 好悦耳的单音，我收到啦。
t_en: What a sweet note. I've got it now.

t_ch: 于是，在「过去」的记忆中，你领会了三月精湛的箭术……
t_en: And so, in a memory from the "past," you inherited March's mastery of the bow...

t_ch: 而那支承载金焰的箭矢，将会在「未来」划过星空，成为银河的曙光♪
t_en: And that arrow bearing golden flames will streak across the stars in the "future," becoming a glimmer of hope for the cosmos ♪

t_ch: 「三重命途交织缠绕着翁法罗斯，共同谱写世界的命运」——按照你的说法，普通的命途行者不会在镜中留下痕迹，所以……
t_en: "Three Paths interweave and fetter Amphoreus, co-authoring the fate of the world." Ordinary Pathstriders aren't known to leave traces in the mirror, so if what you said is true...

t_ch: 在这遗世独立的星系，诞生过至少三位堪比「令使」的存在。
t_en: Then this isolated star system must have been home to at least three beings comparable to Emanators.

t_ch: 甚至，可能是星神本人垂迹。
t_en: I would even go as far as to say Aeons THEMSELVES.

t_ch: 为了让翁法罗斯被群星眷顾，「记忆」向银河求援。
t_en: To gain the favor of the stars for Amphoreus, the Remembrance sent a call for help to the cosmos.

t_ch: 可惜，权杖的阻力太过强大：即便「神明」，也只能向同路人送去一道转瞬即逝的模因……
t_en: But the obstruction from the Scepter was far too strong. Even the "gods" could do nothing more than send a fleeting memetic being to someone who walked the same path...

t_ch: 好在，黑天鹅小姐捉住了那一瞬呀。
t_en: Thankfully, Miss Black Swan caught that fleeting moment.

t_ch: 播下因果的涟漪——
t_en: Let the ripples of causality spread...

t_ch: ——照耀「忆庭之镜」。
t_en: Light up the Garden of Recollection's Mirror.

t_ch: 虽然，那道信号也吸引了一些…不那么愉快的注目……
t_en: Though that signal drew some... unpleasant attention as well...

t_ch: 但现在看来，一切是值得的。
t_en: Looking back now, it was all worth it.

t_ch: 银河向我们露出了温柔的一面呢。
t_en: The cosmos showed us a kinder face.

t_ch: 万幸，{RUBY_B#长夜月}她{RUBY_E#}对「记忆」的理解出现了偏差。
t_en: Thankfully, {RUBY_B#Evernight}she{RUBY_E#} has a different understanding of the Remembrance.

t_ch: 长夜月小姐曾说，「记忆」并非眷顾翁法罗斯，而是在此蓄谋布局，进行吞并命途的准备……
t_en: Miss Evernight once said that the Remembrance wasn't looking after Amphoreus, but rather scheming and preparing to devour the Paths...

t_ch: 她的推演合情合理…只是漏算了「人」在这个故事中所能做到的极限呢。
t_en: Her deduction was perfectly logical... but she failed to account for what the "humans" in this story could achieve.

t_ch: 说不定，我的心中也藏着一个阴谋呢…一个能让每个人都收获幸福的阴谋~
t_en: Maybe I have a scheme of my own... a scheme that will bring happiness to everyone~

t_ch: 以后也要多帮{NICKNAME}他们的忙呀，黑天鹅小姐。
t_en: Please keep helping {NICKNAME} and the others in the future, too, Miss Black Swan.

t_ch: 你要握紧这柄仪式剑。在我离去后，它会把你送回时间的起点，一段新故事的开篇。
t_en: You need to hold tight to this ceremonial blade. After I'm gone, it will take you back to the beginning of time, the start of a new story.

t_ch: 我相信，在那段故事里，又或者无数段相似而不相同的故事之后，大家…所有牺牲的伙伴，都能和我们儿时憧憬的「救世主」一起，在更辽阔的星空下相聚。
t_en: I believe that in that story — or in countless stories, each alike yet unique — everyone... all the companions who sacrificed themselves, alongside the Deliverer we once dreamed of as children, will reunite beneath a vast, endless sky.

t_ch: …倘若我们终究无法冲破这座囚笼，我会坚守。直到有人前来打破这漫长的轮回，为翁法罗斯的命运添上结尾。
t_en: ...If we can never break free from this prison, I will stand my ground. Until the day someone shatters this endless cycle and writes the final chapter of Amphoreus's fate.

t_ch: 一眨眼的功夫，回到命运的转折点啦。
t_en: In the blink of an eye, we have returned to the turning point of fate.

t_ch: 借着一丝缥缈的希望，我们拥抱三千万世徒劳，开启了「永劫回归」。
t_en: With nothing but a fragile sliver of hope, we embraced thirty million cycles of futility and began the Eternal Recurrence.

t_ch: 还记得最初，当神明出现在梦里，隔着一面薄薄的水晶，望着我的时候。
t_en: I still remember the first time I saw the god appear in a dream, looking at me from behind a thin veil of crystal.

t_ch: 人家一度怀疑，祂是不怀好意的坏人呢！
t_en: Back then, I wondered if THEY might be someone with ill intent!

t_ch: 但现在，我终于确信……
t_en: But now, I finally understand...

t_ch: 原来{RUBY_B#我}她{RUBY_E#}一直站在我的身边，还这么美丽呀。
t_en: {RUBY_B#I}She{RUBY_E#} was always standing beside me. And she is so very beautiful.

t_ch: 播下因果的涟漪——
t_en: Let the ripples of causality spread...

t_ch: ——编织「神的梦境」。
t_en: Weave the "dream of a god."

t_ch: 因果…真是无法被阻拦的力量呢。
t_en: Causality... really is a force that cannot be stopped.

t_ch: 即便我想为「昔涟」留下更多话，好像也做不到……
t_en: Even if I wanted to leave a few more words for "Cyrene," it seems I no longer can...

t_ch: 毕竟，你还要留下最后的心识，种下最初的种子呀。
t_en: After all, you still have to leave behind your final consciousness and plant the very first seed.

t_ch: 但我记得你说过，当神明落下眼泪，倒映在涟漪里的，一定是最为美丽的事物。
t_en: I remember what you once said. When a god sheds a tear, the thing reflected in the ripples must be the most beautiful thing in the world.

t_ch: 可是，你知道吗？当翁法罗斯的「心」诞生时，它最先看见的只是一个名字……
t_en: But do you know what Amphoreus saw when its "heart" was born? The first thing it saw was a name...

t_ch: 看来，你已经发现了呀。
t_en: Looks like you figured it out.

t_ch: 有时候，只要换个角度看世界，惊喜就会诞生，对不对？
t_en: Sometimes, all it takes is a change in perspective to reveal something truly unexpected. Don't you agree?

t_ch: 是呀，将这组数字旋转<unbreak>180</unbreak>°，就能看见美丽的永恒，我们所相信的……
t_en: That's right. Turn these numbers upside down, and you'll see a beautiful eternity, something we believe in...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>{RUBY_B#EGO}「真我」{RUBY_E#}。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The "{RUBY_B#EGO}ego{RUBY_E#}."</color>

t_ch: 我想，保护村子里的大家……
t_en: I want to protect everyone in the village...

t_ch: 但是，以我的力量…可以做到吗？
t_en: But... can I really do that with the strength I have?

t_ch: 唔…不想那么多啦。还是，先把老爸安排的农活做完……
t_en: Hmm... I shouldn't think too much. Better finish the farm work Dad left me first...

t_ch: 心中的英雄，自年幼时起便一直陪伴在我和他身边。
t_en: The Hero Within has been by our sides since we were little.

t_ch: 白厄一直都很坚强。但，如果没有那一丝萦绕在脑海中的希望……
t_en: Phainon has always been strong. But without that faint glimmer of hope lingering in his mind...

t_ch: 缠上他的命运和轮回，是否会压垮他呢？
t_en: Would the weight of fate and endless recurrence finally break him?

t_ch: 只要能将一线希望，放进他的心里……
t_en: If only someone could place even a sliver of hope inside his heart...

t_ch: 他就一定能坚持下来。
t_en: He would hold on and keep going.

t_ch: 没错，只需要一点点火苗……
t_en: Yes. Just a single spark...

t_ch: 他就能守着一丝光明，成为熊熊燃烧的烈阳。
t_en: And he would guard that fragile light, until it turned into a blazing sun.

t_ch: 我已经没有力气…将心中的英雄，捏塑成{NICKNAME}的模样了呀。
t_en: I no longer have the strength... to make The Hero Within look like {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 那…就为他<color=#dbc291ff>留下「神谕」吧。</color>
t_en: So... let me <color=#dbc291ff>leave behind a "prophecy" for him</color>.

t_ch: 播下因果的涟漪——
t_en: Let the ripples of causality spread...

t_ch: ——昭告「灰白的黎明」。
t_en: Proclaim a "pale dawn."

t_ch: 带着这份愿望走下去吧…成为开启「救世」的英雄……
t_en: Take this wish with you... Be the hero who begins the mission of Deliverance...

t_ch: 诚如神谕所示：<color=#dbc291ff>「汝将肩负骄阳，直至灰白的黎明显著」</color>……
t_en: As prophecy foretold: <color=#dbc291ff>"You will bear the blazing sun, until the pale dawn breaks"</color>...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>走下去…背负这个世界…直到…灰白的英雄…无名的救世主…带来黎明……</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Continue onward... bearing this world upon your shoulders... until the ashen hero... the nameless Deliverer ushers in the dawn...</color>

t_ch: 至此…你的目光已经贯穿了翁法罗斯，由终至始。
t_en: Now... your eyes have seen through all of Amphoreus, from the end back to the beginning.

t_ch: 这道门背后……
t_en: Behind this door...

t_ch: 飘来了…麦田的香气呢。
t_en: I can smell it... The scent of wheat fields.

t_ch: 聪明的你，应该早就猜到了，对吧？
t_en: You're clever. I bet you figured it out long ago, didn't you?

t_ch: 回望的终点，「∞」最后的缺口……
t_en: The end of this journey back. The final gap in ∞...

t_ch: 就是我们共同的{RUBY_B#哀丽秘榭}故乡{RUBY_E#}呀。
t_en: It leads to the place we both call {RUBY_B#Aedes Elysiae}home{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 可以…回家了呀。
t_en: We can finally... go home.

t_ch: 准备好了吗？
t_en: Are you ready?

t_ch: 如果你将「记忆」留在一切故事的开端，投下那枚最初的石子——
t_en: If you leave "memory" at the very beginning of the story, and cast the first stone...

t_ch: 「∞」最后的缺口就会闭合；<color=#dbc291ff>翁法罗斯的因果循环，将永远锚定在银河中。</color>
t_en: That final gap in ∞ will close. <color=#dbc291ff>The causal loop of Amphoreus will become a fixed point in the stars.</color>

t_ch: 如果…我不那样做……
t_en: And if I don't do that...

t_ch: 那样的话…这个世界，还有天外广袤的银河…可能依旧会坠入「毁灭」。
t_en: Then this world, and the cosmos beyond the sky... might still fall into the Destruction.

t_ch: 我们怎么可能让这种事发生呢？
t_en: There's no way we would let something like that happen, right?

t_ch: 当然啦。
t_en: Exactly.

t_ch: 我记得，哀丽秘榭的那棵树……
t_en: I remember that tree in Aedes Elysiae...

t_ch: 它孤独地生长…哪里也去不了。它独自凝望着海面，想象着…永远到达不了的彼岸……
t_en: It grew all alone... unable to go anywhere. It watched the sea in silence, dreaming of a faraway shore it could never reach...

t_ch: 不过，现在……
t_en: But now...

t_ch: 有一叶小船…它载着从树上摘下的，愿望的种子…航向了远方……
t_en: A tiny boat sets sail. It carries a seed of hope, plucked from the tree, and heads into the great beyond...

t_ch: 即便小船的影子，很快就会消失……
t_en: Even if the boat's shadow fades quickly from sight...

t_ch: 但知晓自己的愿望，将在海的彼端…开花结果……
t_en: The tree knows that its wish will bloom on the other side of the sea...

t_ch: 那一刻的它…一定是幸福的吧？
t_en: In that moment... it must feel happiness, right?

t_ch: 被你说的，人家都开始想念那棵树了呀。
t_en: The way you brought it up... Now I kind of miss that tree too.

t_ch: 走吧，我们一起回家。
t_en: Come on. Let's go home together.

t_ch: 带着它，回到<color=#dbc291ff>祝祭庭院</color>吧——
t_en: Take it with us, back to the <color=#dbc291ff>Sacrament Courtyard</color>...

t_ch: 让它成为「记忆」的楔子，衔接起熟悉的岁月。
t_en: Let it become Remembrance's anchor, tying together the times we knew so well.

t_ch: 让我们一起…回家吧。
t_en: Let's go home... together.

t_ch: 播下因果的涟漪——
t_en: Let the ripples of causality spread...

t_ch: ——回到「少女的故乡」。
t_en: Return to the "girl's homeland."

t_ch: 对了，那最后的音符……
t_en: Oh, that final note...

t_ch: 对哦。其实，它一直都在人家身上呢。
t_en: Right. It's been with me all this time.

t_ch: 这是「哆」，也是「一」，一如初见的一……
t_en: This is "do." It is also the first note, the one from the first time we met...

t_ch: 也是，从一而终的一。
t_en: And the one that stayed to the very end.

t_ch: 哀丽秘榭…一切的起点。
t_en: Aedes Elysiae... The place where it all began.

t_ch: 宛若停滞的时光……
t_en: It's like time itself has stopped...

t_ch: 还有永远不知疲倦的微风和涛声。
t_en: And the breeze and sound of the waves never seem to rest.

t_ch: 播下因果的涟漪——
t_en: Let the ripples of causality spread...

t_ch: ——降下「岁月的神谕」。
t_en: And cast down the "prophecy of Time."

t_ch: 祝祭庭院，我们到啦。
t_en: We've made it. The Sacrament Courtyard.

t_ch: 这里，是我们第一次拿起仪式剑的地方……
t_en: This is the place where we first picked up the ceremonial blade...

t_ch: 也是我们第一次……
t_en: And where we first...

t_ch: 写下日记的地方。
t_en: Began writing journals.

t_ch: 至此，「记忆」的旅途就抵达终点啦。
t_en: Now the journey through "memory" has reached its end.

t_ch: 钉下楔子后，等待我们的…是三千万世的再次相遇。
t_en: Once the anchor is placed, what awaits us... is thirty million lifetimes of reunion.

t_ch: 循环往复，无穷的离别……
t_en: Looping again and again. Endless farewells...

t_ch: 哆、唻、咪、发、嗦、拉、嘻。
t_en: Do, re, mi, fa, sol, la, ti.
